detector.rule: fresh BOS/CHoCH on current bar + bullish confluence (conviction>=50) + break direction agrees; cooldown 45min; warmup 12; trailing 60 bars

strike_offset_convention: calls: strike=atm+offset -> negative=ITM, positive=OTM (verified simulator_real.py L357-364)
honest_verdict: 2/20 cells clear the candidate-edge bar. Best: ATM_stop-8 OOS/trade=$7.7.

DISCLOSURE.authority: real OPRA fills (C1) — the only WR authority; no BS-sim
DISCLOSURE.per_trade: avg_pnl is per-trade EXPECTANCY, reported alongside (not instead of) WR (OP-14)
DISCLOSURE.concentration: top5_day_pct = top-5 winning DAYS as %% of total P&L (OP-20 #5)
DISCLOSURE.oos_normalization: IS=2025 (~12mo) vs OOS=2026 (~5mo); candidate bar is judged on OOS only
DISCLOSURE.coverage_caveat: n_no_opra_data per cell — ITM-2/OTM-2 strikes can fall outside the cached OPRA window on some days; a low-n cell may be a coverage hole, not a real signal count (NOT cherry-picked, anti-pattern 2.10)
DISCLOSURE.spy_vs_option: SPY-direction structure != option edge (C3/L58); this is the option test
DISCLOSURE.no_survivor_mining: every grid cell + every exit combo is reported, not just the best
